add_params.name: Users
add_params.description: Array of user objects from CippFormUserSelector with addedFields {userPrincipalName, displayName}. PS1 reads Users.value and Users.addedFields.userPrincipalName.

add_params.name: PolicyId
add_params.description: CA policy ID. Formatter unwraps autocomplete .value.

add_params.name: StartDate
add_params.description: Unix timestamp (seconds) for start date/time. Formatter sends as 'StartDate' mapping form field 'startDate'.

add_params.name: EndDate
add_params.description: Unix timestamp (seconds) for end date/time. Formatter sends as 'EndDate' mapping form field 'endDate'.

add_params.name: vacation
add_params.description: Always set to true by this form (vacation mode path). PS1 checks if 'vacation' == 'true' (string comparison) to determine scheduling path.

add_params.name: postExecution
add_params.description: Post-execution action objects. Not explicitly in this form but PS1 reads $Request.Body.postExecution.

add_params.name: reference
add_params.description: Not in this form but PS1 reads $Request.Body.reference.

notes: customDataformatter: unwraps tenantFilter autocomplete .value, unwraps PolicyId autocomplete .value, renames form fields 'startDate'→'StartDate' and 'endDate'→'EndDate', hard-codes vacation=true. Users array passes through unchanged (PS1 reads $.value and $.addedFields.userPrincipalName). This form only handles the vacation mode POST path; PS1 also supports direct ExclusionType/UserID params for non-vacation use.
